description:
Lynn and Arne assemble the servants to review the clues and sniff out the killers through deductive reasoning.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Eine Schwalbe macht noch keinen Sommer! 一羽の燕が夏をもたらすのではない
Ichiwa no Tsubame ga Natsu o Motarasu no de wa Nai
One Swallow Does Not a Summer Make!
